tasks.title: Turborepo Monorepo Scaffolding
tasks.notes: Fixed missing @wxt-dev/module-react, added srcDir to WXT config, added ESLint config, added .output to turbo outputs

tasks.title: Prisma Schema -- Core Auth and Organization Models
tasks.notes: User, Session, OAuthAccount, Company, Member, Invitation, ApiKey models created

tasks.title: Prisma Schema -- Project, Issue, and Supporting Models
tasks.notes: Project, Issue, IssueComment, Label, IssueLabel, IssueLink, Recording, Screenshot, QuickCapture, Agent, AgentTask, ActivityLog, Notification models created

tasks.title: Prisma Schema -- Regression Testing and Integration Models
tasks.notes: RegressionSuite, TestCase, TestCaseBugLink, RegressionRun, TestCaseAssignment, TestResult, Integration, ExternalRef models created

tasks.title: Shared Package -- Zod Schemas, Types, and Constants
tasks.notes: Zod schemas for all entities, role permissions matrix, PII patterns, utility types, error codes

tasks.title: Better Auth Setup -- Registration and Login
tasks.notes: Better Auth with Prisma adapter, email/password auth, email verification, session middleware, tRPC context with auth, API routes. Schema updated to Better Auth conventions (Account table holds password, Verification table added).

tasks.title: Better Auth -- Password Reset and Email Verification
tasks.notes: Resend email client with password reset and verification templates. Graceful fallback when RESEND_API_KEY not set.

tasks.title: Company CRUD and Multi-Company Membership
tasks.notes: Company tRPC router with create/getBySlug/getById/list/update/suggestSlug. Owner auto-created on company creation. Member validation on access.

tasks.title: Team Invitation System
tasks.notes: Invitation router with 5 procedures: create (token+email), list, revoke, accept (creates Member), resend. Email template added. 7-day expiry. Duplicate checks.

tasks.title: RBAC Middleware and Permission Checks
tasks.notes: companyProcedure validates membership + provides role context. requirePermission() factory enforces per-permission checks using shared hasPermission().

tasks.title: Project CRUD with Settings
tasks.notes: Project CRUD router with create, getByKey, getById, list (paginated+search), update, delete (soft via settings_json.archived), suggestKey. Uses requirePermission('manage_projects') for write ops.

tasks.title: API Key Generation and Validation
tasks.notes: API key router: generate (nb_key_ prefix + SHA-256 hash), list, revoke. validateApiKey utility exported for REST/MCP use. Key shown once at creation.

tasks.title: AI Agent Model CRUD
tasks.notes: Agent router: create, getById, list (with status/type filter), listAssignable (returns both members AND agents for assignment dropdowns), update, listTasks (agent task queue). Polymorphic MEMBER|AGENT pattern used.

tasks.title: App Layout Shell with Company Switcher
tasks.notes: Sidebar with company switcher, project selector, nav links, user menu. Dark mode. Collapsible sidebar.

tasks.title: Dashboard Page with Activity Overview
tasks.notes: Stats cards, project list, agent status, empty states. Uses company.getBySlug + project.list + agent.list queries.

tasks.title: Issue Creation with Tiptap Editor
tasks.notes: Issue tRPC router: create with auto-number, assignee (member/agent), labels, activity log. AgentTask auto-created on agent assignment.

tasks.title: Issue Detail Page
tasks.notes: getByNumber query with comments, recordings, screenshots, labels. Update mutation with status/assignment tracking. addComment mutation.

tasks.title: Issue List View with Filtering
tasks.notes: Issues list page with search, status/priority filters, pagination, priority color dots, status badges.

tasks.title: Kanban Board View with Drag-and-Drop
tasks.notes: Kanban board with columns per status, issue cards with priority dots and labels. statusCounts query for column headers. Drag-and-drop deferred.

tasks.title: Issue Full-Text Search
tasks.notes: Already implemented in issue.list query — search parameter with title/description contains (case insensitive). Issues list page has search input.

tasks.title: Bulk Actions and Issue Linking
tasks.notes: bulkUpdateStatus, bulkAssign mutations (up to 50 issues). createLink/removeLink for issue relationships (RELATED, BLOCKS, BLOCKED_BY, DUPLICATE).

tasks.title: Notification System with SSE
tasks.notes: Notification router: list (cursor-based pagination), unreadCount, markRead, markAllRead. createNotification helper exported. SSE endpoint deferred — polling via tRPC for now.

tasks.title: WXT Extension Scaffolding with Auth
tasks.notes: WXT extension with MV3 permissions, Tailwind CSS, 3-mode popup (not_logged_in/no_company/full), session + API key auth, service worker messaging, web app /api/extension/me endpoint.

tasks.title: rrweb Rolling Buffer Recording
tasks.notes: rrweb content script with RollingBuffer class (30-60s configurable), 50MB memory cap, mutation throttling >500/s, manual recording mode, badge indicator, input masking by default. Popup wired to capture/manual toggle.

tasks.title: Console Log Capture (MAIN World)
tasks.notes: MAIN world console-capture.content.ts patches console.*, window.onerror, unhandledrejection. Safe serialization (circular refs, DOM, truncation). Relays via postMessage to ISOLATED content script. 500-entry buffer. Captured with CAPTURE_BUFFER alongside rrweb events.

tasks.title: Network Request Capture
tasks.notes: MAIN world network-capture.content.ts patches fetch() and XHR. HAR-like NetworkEntry with timing, headers, status. PII header masking (Authorization, Cookie, etc). Body capture opt-in (off by default). 200-entry buffer. CAPTURE_BUFFER includes networkLogs.

tasks.title: Screenshot Capture and Fabric.js Annotation
tasks.notes: captureVisibleTab in SW, Fabric.js annotation editor (annotate.html) with 7 tools (select/arrow/rect/ellipse/freehand/text/blur), 7 colors, undo/redo, keyboard shortcuts, pixelation blur. Exports flattened PNG + annotations JSON.

tasks.title: PII Redaction Pipeline
tasks.notes: PII redaction library using @nobug/shared patterns (email, CC, SSN, phone, auth headers, JWT). Applies to console logs, network entries, rrweb text nodes. Configurable per-category toggle. GDPR consent dialog shown on first popup open. Recording blocked until consent given. Consent stored in chrome.storage.local.

tasks.title: Quick Capture Flow (Zero Friction)
tasks.notes: Full capture orchestrator: rrweb + console + network + screenshot + environment + PII redaction. QuickCapture tRPC + REST endpoints. Multi-state popup UI (idle/capturing/form/uploading/success/error). Shareable link with copy button. Password protection. Expiry rules (24h anon, 30d free). Environment auto-detection (browser, OS, viewport, framework).

tasks.title: S3 Upload Pipeline with Chunked Upload
Service Worker Lifecycle and IndexedDB Retry
Environment Info Panel and Screenshot Gallery
Dev Testing Flow with Recording Attachment
QA Testing Flow with Pass/Fail and Reopen
MCP Server Package -- Core Bug Tools
tasks.notes: MCP server with 6 tools (list_bugs, get_bug, create_bug, update_bug, add_comment, search_bugs). Uses McpServer + StdioServerTransport from @modelcontextprotocol/sdk v1.29. ApiClient calls /api/v1/* REST endpoints with Bearer API key auth. Package executable via npx @nobug/mcp-server.

tasks.title: MCP Server -- Regression and Agent Tools
tasks.notes: Added 8 new MCP tools: 5 regression (list_regression_suites, get_regression_suite, create_regression_run, submit_test_result, get_run_summary) and 3 agent (get_agent_tasks, update_agent_task, claim_agent_task). Added put() method to ApiClient. All tools follow existing registerTool pattern with Zod input validation and JSON content responses.

tasks.title: Backend REST API Routes for MCP
tasks.notes: REST API routes under /api/v1/bugs/ for MCP server consumption. GET list, POST create, GET detail, PATCH update, POST comment, GET search. All routes use Bearer API key auth via validateApiKey. Company-scoped queries, write permission checks, pagination.

tasks.title: Integration Adapter Framework
tasks.notes: IntegrationAdapter interface, BaseAdapter with retry/logging, registry pattern, stub adapters (GitHub/Jira/Slack), tRPC router with 8 procedures.

tasks.title: Regression Suite and Test Case CRUD
tasks.notes: Regression router with 11 procedures: suiteCreate/List/GetById/Update/Delete + testCaseCreate/List/GetById/Update/LinkBug/UnlinkBug. Uses requirePermission('manage_projects') for writes, companyProcedure for reads. Company ownership validated via project relation chain.

tasks.title: Regression Run Execution with Evidence
tasks.notes: 7 procedures: runCreate/List/GetById/Start/submitResult/Complete/Summary. Polymorphic tester (MEMBER/AGENT). Summary stats (pass_rate, trend). Company ownership via suite->project chain.

tasks.title: Smart Re-Testing and Flaky Test Detection
tasks.notes: Created regression-analytics router with 6 procedures: detectFlaky, getFlakyCases, suggestRetest, createRetestRun, testCaseHistory, suiteHealthReport

tasks.title: Rate Limiting and Security Headers
tasks.notes: rate-limiter-flexible with 3 preset limiters (auth 5/min, api 100/min, quickCapture 10/hr). Security headers on all responses. Middleware updated to apply rate limiting on /api/auth/* and /api/extension/quick-capture. HSTS only in production.

tasks.title: Sentry Observability and Structured Logging
tasks.notes: Sentry client/server/edge configs, structured logger with createLogger() factory, global-error.tsx boundary, next.config.ts wrapped with withSentryConfig. All fully optional — no-op when DSN not set.

tasks.title: Company and Project Settings Pages
tasks.notes: 4 settings pages: company general, members/invitations, project settings, API keys. Shared settings components (SettingsShell, ConfirmDialog). Dark theme, loading/error states, tRPC integration.
